ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the network was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the network was last updated */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of the network (e.g., social, transportation) */,
  "network_size" INTEGER /* Number of nodes in the network */,
  "network_edges" INTEGER /* Number of edges in the network */,
  "network_avg_degree" REAL /* Average degree of the network */,
  "network_max_degree" INTEGER /* Maximum degree of the network */,
  "network_apl" REAL /* Average path length of the network */,
  "network_clust_coef" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the network */,
  "network_diameter" INTEGER /* Diameter of the network */,
  "network_density" REAL /* Density of the network */,
  "network_assortativity" REAL /* Assortativity of the network */,
  "network_avg_distance" REAL /* Average distance between nodes in the network */,
  "network_triads" INTEGER /* Number of triads in the network */,
  "network_girth" INTEGER /* Girth of the network */,
  "network_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the network (e.g., public, private) */,
  "network_status" TEXT /* Status of the network (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network scientist, data analyst) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network for which the metric is computed */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., degree, betweenness) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (if applicable) */,
  "metric_computed_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was computed */,
  "metric_computed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who computed the metric */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network for which the property is computed */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., density, diameter) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "property_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property (if applicable) */,
  "property_computed_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was computed */,
  "property_computed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who computed the property */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_metrics" (
  "node_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node metric */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node for which the metric is computed */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., degree, betweenness) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "node_metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the node metric */,
  "node_metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the node metric (if applicable) */,
  "node_metric_computed_date" TEXT /* Date when the node metric was computed */,
  "node_metric_computed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who computed the node metric */,
  "node_metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the node metric (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_properties" (
  "node_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node property */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node for which the property is computed */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., coreness, pagerank) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "node_property_description" TEXT /* Description of the node property */,
  "node_property_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the node property (if applicable) */,
  "node_property_computed_date" TEXT /* Date when the node property was computed */,
  "node_property_computed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who computed the node property */,
  "node_property_status" TEXT /* Status of the node property (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the network */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for the access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is collaborating */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network that is being collaborated on */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration ended */,
  "collaboration_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead, participant) */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network that the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report (e.g., text, markdown) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network that the visualization is of */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, chart) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network that has versions */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the network */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)
